patches.content:
Index: 
===================================================================
--- 
+++ 
@@ -2,61 +2,86 @@
 import { deepPurple } from '@material-ui/core/colors';
 
 export default makeStyles((theme) => ({
   appBar: {
-    borderRadius: 15,
-    margin: '30px 0',
+    borderRadius: 20,
+    margin: '20px 0',
     display: 'flex',
     flexDirection: 'row',
     justifyContent: 'space-between',
     alignItems: 'center',
-    padding: '10px 50px',
+    padding: '10px 60px',
+    boxShadow: '0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)',
+    backgroundColor: '#ffffff',
+    transition: 'all 0.3s ease',
     [theme.breakpoints.down('sm')]: {
       flexDirection: 'column',
+      padding: '10px 20px',
     },
   },
   heading: {
-    color: theme.palette.primary.main,
+    color: '#3f51b5',
     textDecoration: 'none',
-    fontSize: '2em',
-    fontWeight: 300,
+    fontSize: '2.2rem',
+    fontWeight: 500,
+    fontFamily: 'Roboto, sans-serif',
   },
   image: {
-    marginLeft: '10px',
+    marginLeft: '15px',
     marginTop: '5px',
+    borderRadius: '5px',
   },
   toolbar: {
     display: 'flex',
     justifyContent: 'flex-end',
-    width: '400px',
+    width: '420px',
     [theme.breakpoints.down('sm')]: {
-      width: 'auto',
+      width: '100%',
+      marginTop: '10px',
+      justifyContent: 'center',
     },
   },
   profile: {
     display: 'flex',
     justifyContent: 'space-between',
-    width: '400px',
+    width: '420px',
     alignItems: 'center',
     [theme.breakpoints.down('sm')]: {
-      width: 'auto',
-      marginTop: 20,
+      width: '100%',
+      marginTop: 15,
       justifyContent: 'center',
+      flexWrap: 'wrap',
     },
   },
   logout: {
     marginLeft: '20px',
+    fontWeight: 500,
+    textTransform: 'capitalize',
+    transition: '0.3s',
+    '&:hover': {
+      backgroundColor: '#f50057',
+      color: '#fff',
+    },
   },
   userName: {
     display: 'flex',
     alignItems: 'center',
-    textAlign: 'center',
+    fontWeight: 500,
+    color: '#555',
   },
   brandContainer: {
     display: 'flex',
     alignItems: 'center',
+    cursor: 'pointer',
+    transition: '0.3s',
+    '&:hover img': {
+      transform: 'scale(1.05)',
+    },
   },
   purple: {
     color: theme.palette.getContrastText(deepPurple[500]),
     backgroundColor: deepPurple[500],
+    width: '45px',
+    height: '45px',
+    fontSize: '1.2rem',
   },
 }));
\ No newline at end of file
